description_long: This is a modern, two-seater sofa upholstered in a light beige fabric, featuring a clean, boxy silhouette with slightly flared armrests. The seat is divided into two distinct cushions, and the backrest consists of two matching rectangular cushions, both appearing firmly padded and uniform in size. Two blue accent pillows are placed on the left side, adding a pop of color and comfort, while a gray throw blanket is draped over the right armrest and seat. The sofa stands on four short, angled wooden legs with a natural finish, providing stability and a touch of mid-century style. The upholstery appears smooth and matte, with subtle signs of use visible on the seat. This piece would fit well in urban environments such as apartment lobbies, waiting areas, or outdoor covered patios.
description: A light beige, two-seater sofa with flared armrests, blue accent pillows, a gray throw, and angled wooden legs. The design is modern and clean, with smooth upholstery and a comfortable, inviting appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full sofa, two blue pillows on the left, a gray throw on the right, and both seat and back cushions clearly visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the flared armrest, the blue pillows against the backrest, and the gray throw draped over the arm and seat.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest cushions and the sofa's overall rectangular shape, with legs visible at the corners.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the gray throw covering the armrest and seat, with the blue pillows partially visible on the far side.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, uniform seat cushions and two matching backrest cushions, all attached and rectangular; two loose blue accent pillows placed on the left side.
attribute_armrest_style: Flared, straight armrests at seat height, fully upholstered in the same beige fabric, with a clean, angular profile and no visible decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, angled legs positioned at the corners, made of wood with a natural finish, exposed and slightly tapered for a mid-century modern look.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrest composed of two large, rectangular, attached cushions forming a continuous surface with no tufting or decorative stitching.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid beige fabric with a smooth, matte finish and no visible pattern or decorative stitching; accent pillows and throw provide color contrast.
